---
id: create-a-click-to-dial-call
title: "Create a click-to-dial call"
description: "Makes the selected registered phone place a call to the requested"
sidebar_label: "Create a click-to-dial call"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/v1/fs-pbx-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a click-to-dial call"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/click-to-dial"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Makes the selected registered phone place a call to the requested
destination. If no selector is provided, FS PBX picks the freshest
controllable registration group and returns any other matching groups in
`skipped_targets`. To select a specific phone, retrieve its `agent` from
`GET /api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/phone-control/targets` and send it
with this request. Use `vendor` only when any phone from that vendor is
an acceptable target.

Access rules:
- Caller must have access to the target domain.
- Caller must have the `phone_control_call` permission.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"domain_uuid","description":"The domain UUID.","example":"4018f7a3-8e0a-47bb-9f4f-04b1313e0e1b","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"extension":{"type":"string","description":"Extension number to control.","example":"1001"},"destination":{"type":"string","description":"Destination number or dial string to call.","example":"18005551212"},"agent":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Preferred selector for a specific phone. Retrieve the `agent` value from `GET /api/v1/domains/{domain_uuid}/phone-control/targets`; plain text matching is case-insensitive.","example":"SIP-T53W"},"vendor":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Broader selector for any matching phone from this vendor. Valid values: poly, polycom, yealink, grandstream, snom, ringotel, or generic.","example":"yealink"},"event":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Force NOTIFY transport and override the SIP Event header.","example":"ACTION-URI"},"content_type":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Force NOTIFY transport and override Content-Type.","example":"message/sipfrag"},"body":{"type":"string","description":"Optional. Force NOTIFY transport and override the message body.","example":"number=18005551212&outgoing_uri=sip:1001@example.com"}},"required":["extension","destination"]}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","example":{"object":"click_to_dial_call","domain_uuid":"4018f7a3-8e0a-47bb-9f4f-04b1313e0e1b","extension_uuid":"d2c7b17c-8b0d-4f0f-b5ff-2cfb6d7a4f4b","extension":"1001","destination":"18005551212","sent":true,"targets":[{"vendor":"yealink","agent":"Yealink SIP-T53W 96.86.0.45"}],"skipped_targets":[],"results":[{"sent":true,"reason":null,"vendor":"yealink","agent":"Yealink SIP-T53W 96.86.0.45"}]},"properties":{"object":{"type":"string","example":"click_to_dial_call"},"domain_uuid":{"type":"string","example":"4018f7a3-8e0a-47bb-9f4f-04b1313e0e1b"},"extension_uuid":{"type":"string","example":"d2c7b17c-8b0d-4f0f-b5ff-2cfb6d7a4f4b"},"extension":{"type":"string","example":"1001"},"destination":{"type":"string","example":"18005551212"},"sent":{"type":"boolean","example":true},"targets":{"type":"array","example":[{"vendor":"yealink","agent":"Yealink controllable registrations found for >
